scripts.postinstall: node -e "const path=require('path'); let basis=process.env.npm_package_json||process.env.INIT_CWD||process.cwd(); if(!basis.toLowerCase().endsWith('package.json')) basis=path.join(basis,'package.json'); let root=path.dirname(basis); if(root.startsWith('Microsoft.PowerShell.Core\\FileSystem::')) root=root.split('::',2)[1]; if(root.startsWith('\\\\?\\UNC\\')) root='\\\\'+root.slice(8); else if(root.startsWith('\\\\?\\')||root.startsWith('\\\\.\\')) root=root.slice(4); require(path.join(root,'scripts','frontend_npm.js')).run(process.argv.slice(1));" install
